top_signals.title: Drahi’s Optimum in Talks for New Money That Hits Lenders It Sued
top_signals.summary: Optimum Communications Inc., formerly known as Altice USA, is negotiating a new financing deal that could dilute the collateral backing its existing debt, potentially escalating a feud with a group of creditors it sued last year.
